product_overview: Single-page, terminal-inspired personal portfolio that uses a scroll-driven JPEG hero sequence, CLI-styled sections, and a Resend-backed contact form to showcase Micah Mei’s experience and projects.
core_goals: Create a memorable first impression with a full-viewport, scroll-scrubbed JPEG hero sequence.
Present clear credibility signals (headline, GPA, school/degree, structured experience and projects).
Provide a reliable inbound contact flow that posts to /api/contact and surfaces success/failure messages.
Optimize perceived performance with preloading and graceful fallbacks for heavy assets.
Keep content and secrets maintainable (component-scoped content, env-based email config).

features.name: Scroll-driven hero sequence
features.description: Full-viewport canvas that scrubs through 120 JPEG frames (public/sequence1) by vertical scroll progress while overlaying name and subtitle.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Wait for hero frames to preload -> See loading state transition to hero canvas -> Scroll vertically through the hero track to advance frames -> View name overlay and subtitle overlay during hero -> Scroll past hero end to hand off to the next section

Navigate to / -> Wait for hero frames to preload -> See loading state shown -> Preload fails or frames 404/time out -> See hero load error UI message -> Scroll past the hero area to continue to page content

features.name: About terminal section
features.description: Terminal-styled 'readme' block that reveals the about copy via a typing-style animation when the section enters view.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Scroll until the about section enters view -> See animated terminal prompt appear -> See typing-style reveal of about copy
Navigate to / -> Scroll until the about section enters view -> JavaScript animation disabled or runtime error occurs -> See static about copy fallback (non-animated) in the same terminal-styled block

features.name: Experience timeline
features.description: Vertical timeline that lists internships and roles with dates and highlights presented as scrollable content.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Scroll to experience section -> See vertical timeline render and enter view -> Read role titles in the timeline -> Read organization names and dates -> Read the role highlights for each entry

Navigate to / -> Scroll to experience section -> Timeline motion fails to initialize or JS error occurs -> See a static list of experience entries without motion -> Read role titles, organization names, dates, and highlights

features.name: Projects grid with hover motion
features.description: Grid of project cards that use GSAP-driven hover affordances to show motion and expanded copy on hover.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Scroll to projects section -> See project grid render with project cards -> Hover a project card -> See GSAP-driven hover motion and expanded copy appear

Navigate to / -> Scroll to projects section -> See project grid render with project cards -> Hover a project card -> GSAP fails or is unavailable -> Card remains static but title and copy remain readable

features.name: Contact form (Resend)
features.description: CLI-styled contact form in the footer that submits name, reply-to email, and message to the server which forwards via Resend.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Scroll to contact footer -> Fill name field -> Fill reply-to email field -> Fill message field -> Click Submit button -> Request POST /api/contact sent -> Receive 200 response from server -> See success status message below the form

Navigate to / -> Scroll to contact footer -> Leave one or more required fields empty -> Click Submit button -> Client-side validation prevents submit or POST /api/contact returns 400 -> See validation error message below the form

Navigate to / -> Scroll to contact footer -> Fill name, email, and message fields -> Click Submit button -> Request POST /api/contact sent -> Server responds with Resend validation error due to onboarding@resend.dev or CONTACT_TO_EMAIL mismatch -> See server error message with Resend validation hint below the form

features.name: Custom terminal cursor
features.description: Optional decorative pointer cursor that follows the pointer on fine-pointer devices; wrapped in an error boundary so failures do not break the page.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Use a fine-pointer device (desktop) -> Move the mouse -> See custom terminal cursor follow pointer
Navigate to / -> Use an unsupported device or runtime error occurs in cursor component -> Cursor fails to mount and error boundary triggers -> See default OS cursor and no page break

routes.description: Single-page portfolio with hero, about, experience, projects, terminal section, and contact footer

features.name: Scroll-driven hero sequence
features.description: Full-viewport canvas displays 120 JPEG frames from public/sequence1 scrubbed by scroll progress
user_interactions: Load the home page and wait for hero frame preload
Scroll vertically through the hero track to advance frames
View name and subtitle overlay during hero

features.name: About terminal section
features.description: Typing-style reveal of about copy in a terminal metaphor
user_interactions: Scroll until the about section enters view
Read animated terminal prompt and body text

features.name: Experience timeline
features.description: Vertical timeline of internships and roles
user_interactions: Read role titles, organizations, dates, and highlights

features.name: Projects grid with hover motion
features.description: Project cards with GSAP-driven hover affordances
user_interactions: Hover project cards to see motion and expanded copy

features.name: Contact form (Resend)
features.description: CLI-styled form submits name, email, and message to email delivery service
user_interactions: Fill name, reply-to email, and message fields
See success or error status message below the form

features.name: Custom terminal cursor
features.description: Optional decorative pointer cursor on fine-pointer devices; wrapped in error boundary
user_interactions: Move mouse on desktop to see custom cursor follow pointer

known_limitations.issue: Hero requires 120 static JPEG assets under public/sequence1; missing or slow assets show load error UI
known_limitations.impact: Blank or error hero if assets 404 or time out

known_limitations.issue: Contact email delivery depends on Resend env vars; test mode restricts recipient when using onboarding@resend.dev
known_limitations.impact: Submissions may fail validation until domain verified or CONTACT_TO_EMAIL matches Resend account

known_limitations.issue: Dev server pinned to port 3042 in package.json; wrong URL returns 404 from other local apps
known_limitations.impact: User must open http://localhost:3042 during local development
